description: Style Noteshorts are the coolest bottoms to wear in the current season - and perhaps the most versatile too. Slip into this pair when on a long journey, a casual day at home or at the gym. Pair them with sports shoes or flip flops to suit the occasion.Product DetailsWhite shorts which have two insert pockets on the sides, a wide elasticated waistband with drawstrings inside, engineered with climalite technology, adidas three patented stripes in tape detail on the sides, panels in black at the hem, a mesh panel at the back below the waistband and crotch area and branding printed below the left pocketMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry or bleachFlat dry in shadeCool iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
